hooks.command: $env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('PATH', 'Machine') + ';' + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable('PATH', 'User'); Set-Location 'c:\Users\errea\Desktop\Web'; git add .; $status = git status --porcelain; if ($status) { git commit -m 'actualizacion'; git push origin main } 2>$null
